{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Crimson Tree
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Crimson Tree]] is a tree that has a long crack running through its flesh.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
